summary: Tests cover all major requirements (urgency classification, warning window, output formats, error handling, workflow integration via act). Well-organized unit + integration structure with proper fixtures. Significant gaps: no direct CLI wrapper tests, missing edge cases (negative/zero rotationDays, date parsing errors, empty arrays, timezone handling, sorting stability), fixture contents undocumented, workflow tests use unexplained magic strings ('Tests Passed: 17') and fragile act output pattern matching. Would catch obvious regressions in core paths but miss subtle bugs in boundaries and special cases.
